message:
refactor: consolidate decision context parsing via typed parse helpers

Replace scattered serde_json::from_str::<DecisionContext> and raw JSON
field access for decision contexts with the new centralized helpers:

renderers.rs:
- parse_decision_context() now delegates to
  parse_serialized_decision_context() from policy module

reports.rs:
- Remove local parse_decision_context() function entirely
- policy_surface_from_decision_context() now uses
  parse_serialized_decision_surface() which handles both typed
  DecisionContext and legacy raw-JSON formats with a single call

main.rs (why/audit commands):
- Extract parse_typed_audit_decision_context() and
  audit_decision_context_json() as shared helpers
- audit_decision_context_json() tries typed parse first, falls back
  to raw JSON for legacy audit entries
- Replace 3 inline serde_json::from_str calls in handle_why_recent()
  and render_why_decision() with the new helpers
- Add 3 unit tests: typed context preference, legacy JSON fallback,
  invalid payload handling

mcp_proxy_integration.rs:
- wait_for_proxy_audit_row() now returns decision_context column
- proxy_routes_remote_calls_with_audit_traceability test verifies
  typed DecisionContext fields (action, actor, surface, determining
  rule) and evidence entries (stage, tool, elapsed_ms, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
